mapper.select:
select ri.id as room_id, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ri.apartment_id, ai.name as apartment_name, coalesce(g.graph_count, 0) as graph_count, coalesce(a.attr_count, 0) as attr_count, coalesce(f.facility_count, 0) as facility_count, coalesce(l.label_count, 0) as label_count, coalesce(p.payment_type_count, 0) as payment_type_count, coalesce(t.lease_term_count, 0) as lease_term_count, coalesce(b.browse_count, 0) as browse_count, coalesce(rf.favorite_count, 0) as favorite_count, coalesce(va.appointment_count, 0) as appointment_count, coalesce(lo.order_count, 0) as order_count from room_info ri left join apartment_info ai on ri.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 left join ( select item_id as room_id, count(*) as graph_count from graph_info where is_deleted = 0 and item_type = 2 group by item_id ) g on g.room_id = ri.id left join ( select room_id, count(*) as attr_count from room_attr_value where is_deleted = 0 group by room_id ) a on a.room_id = ri.id left join ( select room_id, count(*) as facility_count from room_facility where is_deleted = 0 group by room_id ) f on f.room_id = ri.id left join ( select room_id, count(*) as label_count from room_label where is_deleted = 0 group by room_id ) l on l.room_id = ri.id left join ( select room_id, count(*) as payment_type_count from room_payment_type where is_deleted = 0 group by room_id ) p on p.room_id = ri.id left join ( select room_id, count(*) as lease_term_count from room_lease_term where is_deleted = 0 group by room_id ) t on t.room_id = ri.id left join ( select room_id, count(*) as browse_count from browsing_history where is_deleted = 0 group by room_id ) b on b.room_id = ri.id left join ( select room_id, count(*) as favorite_count from room_favorite where is_deleted = 0 group by room_id ) rf on rf.room_id = ri.id left join ( select apartment_id, count(*) as appointment_count from view_appointment where is_deleted = 0 group by apartment_id ) va on va.apartment_id = ri.apartment_id left join ( select room_id, count(*) as order_count from lease_order where is_deleted = 0 group by room_id ) lo on lo.room_id = ri.id
ri.is_deleted = 0
and ri.apartment_id = #{apartmentId}
order by ri.update_time desc, ri.id desc
